query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.invoiceDate
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Gumdale%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Stafford Heights%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Albany Family%'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.invoiceDate
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Gumdale%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Stafford Heights%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Albany Family%'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 30;
